plan.title: Onboarding tutorial is broken — content mismatched with UI after UX changes
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: The onboarding tutorial has 4 broken steps: Step 1 targets a nonexistent `main h1` selector, Step 4 targets an admin-only deprecated Organizer link, Step 5's `a[href*="settings"]` selector matches the Goals link instead of Settings, and Step 2's copy may reference stale voice features. First-time users see mismatched highlights and explanations.
narratives.Proposal: Fix all selectors to use explicit `data-tour` attributes added to the correct UI elements. Update tour step content to match current UI terminology. Update E2E tests to use workspace URLs and validate the fixes.
narratives.Constraint: Keep the existing 5-step tour structure. No new steps, no flow redesign. Only modify selectors, content text, and data-tour attributes. Frontend-only changes (no backend).
narratives.Risk: Low risk — changes are localized to tour definitions, a few data-tour attributes on existing components, and E2E test assertions. No functional UI changes.
narratives.Alternative: Could have redesigned the tour with new steps for Daily Debrief, Goals, etc. — rejected to keep scope minimal and ship the fix quickly.

items.title: Fix tour step selectors and add data-tour attributes to UI components

narrative.Action: Add `data-tour="briefing-heading"` to the `<h2>` in Briefing.jsx. Add `data-tour="home-nav"` to the Home sidebar link in PersonalSection.tsx. Add `data-tour="settings-nav"` to the Settings bottom menu item in Sidebar.tsx. Update all 5 TOUR_STEPS selectors in InteractiveTour.tsx to use the new data-tour attributes: Step 1 → `[data-tour="briefing-heading"]`, Step 4 → `[data-tour="home-nav"]`, Step 5 → `[data-tour="settings-nav"]`. Files: Briefing.jsx, PersonalSection.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, InteractiveTour.tsx.

subItems.title: Step 1 highlights the 'Today's Briefing' heading via data-tour attribute
Step 4 highlights the Home nav link (not deprecated Organizer) for all users
Step 5 highlights the Settings bottom menu link, not the Goals link

items.title: Update tour step content text to match current UI

narrative.Action: Update Step 4 content from 'Access your personal tasks, life areas, and household features from here' to describe the Home/Daily Briefing as the daily starting point. Verify Step 2's 'voice commands' mention is still accurate — if voice input isn't accessible from the add button, remove that claim. Ensure all step titles and descriptions match what the user sees. File: InteractiveTour.tsx.

subItems.title: Step 4 content accurately describes the Home navigation item and its purpose
Step 2 content about voice commands is verified accurate or removed

items.title: Update interactive tour E2E tests for workspace URLs and new selectors

narrative.Action: Update tests/e2e/onboarding/interactive-tour.spec.ts: Replace hardcoded `myn.test` URLs with workspace-aware URLs using the TEST_FRONTEND_URL env var pattern (see base.fixture.ts). Update test assertions to match new step content and selectors. Ensure all 11 existing tests pass with the updated tour. File: interactive-tour.spec.ts.

subItems.title: E2E tests use TEST_FRONTEND_URL env var instead of hardcoded myn.test
All test assertions updated to match new step content and selectors
All 11 interactive tour E2E tests pass
